title: Training Budget and Professional Development Request Process
text:
Q: How can I request funding for training and professional development?
A: Employees can request funding for training and professional development through the company's Professional Development Request Form, which is available on the HR intranet. To initiate the process, complete the form detailing the training program, associated costs, and how it aligns with your career goals and the company's objectives. Submit the form to your direct manager for approval at least 30 days prior to the training start date. Once approved by your manager, the request will be forwarded to the HR department for final review. HR will notify you of the decision within 10 business days. Please note that the training budget is limited and requests are considered on a first-come, first-served basis. For any questions or assistance, contact the HR team at hr@company.com.
